recommendations.title: Never Look Away
recommendations.overview: German artist Kurt Barnert has escaped East Germany and now lives in West Germany, but is tormented by his childhood under the Nazis and the GDR regime.

recommendations.title: Kundun
recommendations.overview: The Tibetans refer to the Dalai Lama as 'Kundun', which means 'The Presence'. He was forced to escape from his native home, Tibet, when communist China invaded and enforced an oppressive regime upon the peaceful nation. The Dalai Lama escaped to Indi

recommendations.title: Sleeper
recommendations.overview: Miles Monroe, a clarinet-playing health food store proprietor, is revived out of cryostasis 200 years into a future world in order to help rebels fight an oppressive government regime.

recommendations.title: Wasp Network
recommendations.overview: Havana, Cuba, 1990. René González, an airplane pilot, unexpectedly flees the country, leaving behind his wife Olga and his daughter Irma, and begins a new life in Miami, where he becomes a member of an anti-Castro organization.

recommendations.title: The Damned
recommendations.overview: In the early days of Nazi Germany, a powerful noble family must adjust to life under the new dictatorship regime.

recommendations.title: Detour
recommendations.overview: The life of Al Roberts, a pianist in a New York nightclub, turns into a nightmare when he decides to hitchhike to Los Angeles to visit his girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Leave Her to Heaven
recommendations.overview: A socialite marries a prominent novelist, which spurs a violent, obsessive, and dangerous jealousy in her.

recommendations.title: The Last Match
recommendations.overview: Cuba is not a country for young gays. Teen rent boy Reinier falls in love with a mate in the slum soccer field in their neighbourhood in Havana. Although obsessed with moneymaking to hold up his baby, teen wife, and wife's grandma, gambler Reinier al

recommendations.title: The Last Days of Disco
recommendations.overview: Two young women and their friends spend spare time at an exclusive nightclub in 1980s New York.

recommendations.title: She Done Him Wrong
recommendations.overview: New York singer and nightclub owner Lady Lou has more male friends than can be imagined. One is a vicious escaped criminal on the way to see 'his' girl, unaware she hasn't exactly been faithful in his absence. Help is at hand in the form of young Cap
